allow: Bash(printf '%s\\n' '/**' ' * precadastro-bug-hunt.test.ts' ' *' ' * Exhaustive tests for the precadastro creation flow.' ' * Maps every validation layer: page Zod -> service Zod -> DB constraints.' ' *' ' * Key investigations:' ' * 1. type=academico WITH accent vs DB comment says academico WITHOUT accent' ' * 2. registrationType required in page schema, optional/nullable in service' ' * 3. Payload column name registrationType \(camelCase\) must match DB quoted column' ' * 4. Empty message: page sends raw empty string to service \(not undefined\)' ' * 5. Whitespace-padded short names bypass Zod min\(2\) but fail DB trim constraint' ' */' '' 'import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from '\\''vitest'\\'';' 'import { PreCadastroSchema } from '\\''../validation/schemas'\\'';' 'import { z } from '\\''zod'\\'';')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '// ---- Supabase mock -------------------------------------------------------' 'const mockInsert = vi.fn<any>\(\);' '' 'vi.mock\('\\''../supabaseClient'\\'', \(\) => \({' '  supabase: {' '    from: vi.fn\(\(\) => \({' '      select: vi.fn\(\).mockReturnValue\({' '        order: vi.fn\(\).mockResolvedValue\({ data: [], error: null }\),' '      }\),' '      insert: mockInsert,' '      update: vi.fn\(\(\) => \({ eq: vi.fn\(\).mockResolvedValue\({ error: null }\) }\)\),' '      delete: vi.fn\(\(\) => \({ eq: vi.fn\(\).mockResolvedValue\({ error: null }\) }\)\),' '    }\)\),' '  },' '}\)\);' '' 'vi.mock\('\\''../store/app.store'\\'', async \(\) => {' '  const actual = await vi.importActual\('\\''../store/app.store'\\''\);' '  return {' '    ...actual as any,' '    isEditor: vi.fn\(\(\) => false\),' '    showToast: vi.fn\(\),' '    logActivity: vi.fn\(\),' '    notifyState: vi.fn\(\),' '  };' '}\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '// ---- Helpers -------------------------------------------------------------' '' '/** Simulates exactly what PreCadastroPage.tsx does before calling createPreCadastro */' 'function simulatePageSubmit\(input: {' '  registrationType: string | null;' '  name: string;' '  email: string;' '  type: string;' '  message: string;' '}\) {' '  return PreCadastroSchema.safeParse\({' '    registrationType: input.registrationType ?? undefined,' '    name: input.name,' '    email: input.email,' '    type: input.type,' '    message: input.message || undefined,' '  }\);' '}' '' '/** The internal CreatePreCadastroSchema copied from service for direct testing */' 'const CreatePreCadastroSchema = z.object\({' '  name: z.string\(\).min\(2\).max\(100\),' '  email: z.string\(\).email\(\),' '  type: z.string\(\).min\(1\).optional\(\),' '  registrationType: z.string\(\).optional\(\).nullable\(\),' '  message: z.string\(\).max\(1000\).optional\(\),' '}\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '// The accented value the page actually produces from the Academico button' '// '\\''Ac\\u00e1demico'\\''.toLowerCase\(\) => '\\''ac\\u00e1demico'\\'' \(accent on '\\''a'\\'' preserved\)' 'const ACADEMICO_FROM_PAGE = '\\''Ac\\u00e1demico'\\''.toLowerCase\(\);' '// supabase_schema.sql line 190 comment lists '\\''academico'\\'' without accent' 'const ACADEMICO_IN_DB_COMMENT = '\\''academico'\\'';')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '// ---- LAYER 1: PreCadastroSchema \(page-level validation\) ------------------' '' 'describe\('\\''Layer 1 - PreCadastroSchema \(page-level\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '  describe\('\\''registrationType field'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '    it\('\\''accepts all four valid registration types'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const types = ['\\''membro'\\'', '\\''parceiro'\\'', '\\''colaborador'\\'', '\\''embaixador'\\''] as const;' '      types.forEach\(rt => {' '        const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: rt, name: '\\''Joao Silva'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '        expect\(result.success, `expected success for registrationType=${rt}`\).toBe\(true\);' '      }\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects null registrationType \(not selected\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: null, name: '\\''Joao Silva'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '      if \(!result.success\) {' '        const paths = result.error.errors.map\(e => e.path[0]\);' '        expect\(paths\).toContain\('\\''registrationType'\\''\);' '      }' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects undefined registrationType \(null ?? undefined = undefined\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = PreCadastroSchema.safeParse\({' '        registrationType: undefined,' '        name: '\\''Joao Silva'\\'',' '        email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'',' '        type: '\\''individual'\\'',' '        message: undefined,' '      }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects arbitrary string as registrationType'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''voluntario'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '  }\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '  describe\('\\''name field'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '    it\('\\''accepts name with exactly 2 characters'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Jo'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''accepts name with exactly 100 characters'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const name = '\\''A'\\''.repeat\(100\);' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name, email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects empty name'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\'''\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '      if \(!result.success\) {' '        const paths = result.error.errors.map\(e => e.path[0]\);' '        expect\(paths\).toContain\('\\''name'\\''\);' '      }' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects name with 1 character'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''J'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects name with 101 characters'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const name = '\\''A'\\''.repeat\(101\);' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name, email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '  }\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '  describe\('\\''email field'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '    it\('\\''accepts valid email'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao Silva'\\'', email: '\\''joao@exemplo.pt'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects empty email'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao Silva'\\'', email: '\\'''\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '      if \(!result.success\) {' '        const paths = result.error.errors.map\(e => e.path[0]\);' '        expect\(paths\).toContain\('\\''email'\\''\);' '      }' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects email without @'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao Silva'\\'', email: '\\''naoeemail'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects email without domain extension'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao Silva'\\'', email: '\\''joao@nodomain'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '  }\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '  describe\('\\''type \(profile\) field'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '    it\('\\''accepts individual \(default value\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''accepts empresarial'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''empresarial'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''accepts academico WITH accent \(page schema allows any non-empty string\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '      // BUG CANDIDATE: ACADEMICO_FROM_PAGE has accent, DB comment shows without accent' '      // PreCadastroSchema uses z.string\(\).min\(1\) so any non-empty string passes here' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: ACADEMICO_FROM_PAGE, message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects empty type string'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\'''\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '      if \(!result.success\) {' '        const paths = result.error.errors.map\(e => e.path[0]\);' '        expect\(paths\).toContain\('\\''type'\\''\);' '      }' '    }\);' '  }\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '  describe\('\\''message field'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '    it\('\\''accepts empty message \(converted to undefined via || undefined in safeParse\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\'''\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''accepts message with exactly 1000 characters'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const msg = '\\''A'\\''.repeat\(1000\);' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: msg }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects message with 1001 characters'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const msg = '\\''A'\\''.repeat\(1001\);' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: msg }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '      if \(!result.success\) {' '        const paths = result.error.errors.map\(e => e.path[0]\);' '        expect\(paths\).toContain\('\\''message'\\''\);' '      }' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''accepts valid message text'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = simulatePageSubmit\({ registrationType: '\\''membro'\\'', name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'', message: '\\''Tenho interesse.'\\'' }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '  }\);' '}\);')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '' '// ---- LAYER 2: CreatePreCadastroSchema \(service-level validation\) ----------' '' 'describe\('\\''Layer 2 - CreatePreCadastroSchema \(service-level\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '  describe\('\\''registrationType divergence from page schema'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '    it\('\\''service accepts null registrationType \(page schema would reject it\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = CreatePreCadastroSchema.safeParse\({' '        name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', registrationType: null, type: '\\''individual'\\'',' '      }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''service accepts undefined registrationType'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = CreatePreCadastroSchema.safeParse\({' '        name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', registrationType: undefined, type: '\\''individual'\\'',' '      }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''service accepts any string as registrationType with no enum check \(reaches DB and causes 400\)'\\'', \(\) => {' '      // BUG: service has z.string\(\).optional\(\).nullable\(\) -- no enum constraint' '      // Invalid value bypasses service and hits DB CHECK constraint => 400 error' '      const result = CreatePreCadastroSchema.safeParse\({' '        name: '\\''Joao'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', registrationType: '\\''voluntario'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'',' '      }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(true\); // documents the gap: should ideally be false' '    }\);' '  }\);' '' '  describe\('\\''name boundary conditions'\\'', \(\) => {' '' '    it\('\\''rejects name with 1 character'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = CreatePreCadastroSchema.safeParse\({' '        name: '\\''J'\\'', email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'',' '      }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '' '    it\('\\''rejects name with 101 characters'\\'', \(\) => {' '      const result = CreatePreCadastroSchema.safeParse\({' '        name: '\\''A'\\''.repeat\(101\), email: '\\''j@e.com'\\'', type: '\\''individual'\\'',' '      }\);' '      expect\(result.success\).toBe\(false\);' '    }\);' '  }\);' '}\);')

Bash(curl -v -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -H "Referer: https://en.wikipedia.org/" -o flag-portugal.png "https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5c/Flag_of_Portugal.svg/1024px-Flag_of_Portugal.svg.png")
